channel.title: MBallSectionsDR
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from MBallSectionsDR, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Cuba Faces a Sunset of Its Socialist Revolution
item.description: Postwar Vietnam is a good model for how a nation can emerge from collectivist tyranny.

item.title: Protectionism Serves K Street and Hurts Main Street
item.description: The lobbying industry has exploded under Trumpâs tariff regime.

item.title: Schumer embraced ID laws to counter fraud in the 1990s, but now calls voter ID 'Jim Crow 2.0'
item.description: A video has emerged of Senate Democratic leader Charles E. Schumer in 1996 talking about the importance of ID checks to prevent welfare fraud by illeg...

item.title: Prosecutors plan to charge an Israeli settler with killing a Palestinian activist in the West Bank
item.description: Israeli prosecutors said Monday that they plan to charge a settler in the killing of a Palestinian activist during a confrontation that was caught on ...

item.title: 5 Things To Know About The Secret Wisconsin School Trans Bathroom Policy
item.description: Across the country, reliably red communities like this one assume their schools reflect their values. One by one, theyâre learning that assumption is ...

item.title: Judge orders Park Service to restore slavery exhibits and compares Trump to Orwell's '1984'
item.description: A federal judge ordered the National Park Service to restore mentions of slavery to a park site associated with George Washington in Philadelphia, sco...

item.title: Outside groups descend on Virginia for redistricting referendum
item.description: A liberal dark money organization has launched a $5 million campaign to persuade voters to back the Democrats' redrawn congressional map in an April r...

item.title: Navigating the GOP Divide over Artificial Intelligence
item.description: The key is to draw a line between AI architecture and AI applications.

item.title: Andrew Sullivan Is A Trump Supporter, But As With Most Things Political He Just Doesnât Know It
item.description: Someone please tell Sullivan that what he wants from the Democrat Party is precisely what's offered by Trump's presidency.

item.title: EXCLUSIVE: Chip Roy Lays Out How Senate Can Vote On SAVE Act Without Nuking Filibuster
item.description: 'We can move the legislation under CURRENT rules without 'nuking' the filibuster,' Roy pointed out.

item.title: Rooting Against Anti-American Olympians Is The Patriotic Thing To Do
item.description: U.S. athletes who use the Olympics as an avenue to thumb their noses at America deserve nothing but scorn and defeat.

item.title: There Is No Such National Holiday as Presidents Day
item.description: George Washingtonâs birthday should not be a celebration of presidents in general.

item.title: Trump sends feds to clean up Potomac River sewage spill
item.description: President Trump on Monday directed federal authorities to step in and aid the cleanup efforts of the wastewater spill in the Potomac River.

item.title: Ed Crane Was Right About Free Speech And The Iraq War Years Before The Country Caught Up
item.description: Ed Crane had a gift for identifying moments when liberty required an unpopular defense â and history has a way of catching up to him.

item.title: Trump Throws In the Towel on Minneapolis Surge
item.description: Ultimately, the battle is about whether our immigration laws can be enforced.
